heading: Application to Alaska
label: 5119 Application to Alaska
text: Sections 5101, 5108, 5110, 5111, 5121, 5124, and 5129 of this title shall after , apply to the Territory of Alaska: , That groups of Indians in Alaska not recognized prior to , as bands or tribes, but having a common bond of occupation, or association, or residence within a well-defined neighborhood, community, or rural district, may organize to adopt constitutions and bylaws and to receive charters of incorporation and Federal loans under sections 5113, 5123, and 5124 of this title.May 1, 1936May 1, 1936Provided
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Territories and Insular Possessions, prior to transfer to and editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 362 of Title 48section 473a of this title
